name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini errored call. `output: null`, `metadata.error` populated by the SDK patch. Shape grounded in a real 404 NOT_FOUND captured 2026-05-19 (invalid model name) — the @google/genai SDK throws an `ApiError` whose `.message` is the raw JSON envelope and whose `.status` is the HTTP status code. Renderer paints the ErrorBanner above the panes and the empty output area degrades gracefully.

parts.text: Some prompt that hit a quota or transient error.

error.message: {"error":{"code":404,"message":"models/gemini-does-not-exist-99 is not found for API version v1beta, or is not supported for generateContent. Call ModelService.ListModels to see the list of available models and their supported methods.","status":"NOT_FOUND"}}
